personality_one_liner: Stable, trustworthy, and functional enterprise utility with clear hierarchy and zero visual clutter.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical padding between form groups; tight grouping within label-to-input.

do's: Use on sticky bottom button containers over scrollable views

screens.name: Splash
screens.purpose: App entry and logic router (checks external file/storage for connections).

states.loading: Full bleed abstract architecture image with dark gradient scrim and centered app wordmark + spinner.

screens.layout: Use a full-screen expo-image with absolute expo-linear-gradient scrim (transparent to surfaceInverse). Position 'Back-On' wordmark in the center.

screens.name: Login
screens.purpose: Authenticate user to the selected enterprise server.

states.error: Inline text below inputs or alert banner.

screens.layout: Top safe area with 'Conexões' icon button on the right. Main container: Title ('Bem-vindo') at top, followed by 3 form fields in a single column (Empresa, Usuário, Senha). 'Empresa' must be a read-only input that opens a bottom-sheet picker of saved connections. Bottom safe area: Sticky 'Entrar' button.

screens.name: Connections

states.empty: Centered desk photo placeholder + 'Nenhuma conexão configurada' + primary CTA.

screens.layout: Header with 'Voltar' (Back). List of saved connections as simple cards showing Empresa and Servidor. A 'Nova Conexão' button sticky at bottom or floating. A modal/bottom sheet opens to add/edit connections containing 'Empresa' and 'Servidor' text inputs + 'Salvar' button.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the <Colors> rule: No blue or purple. The primary brand color is a moss/sage green (#4A5D23). Default fallback for missing hues is near-black or grey.
Implement AsyncStorage or Expo FileSystem to act as the 'external file' to save Connections (Empresa, Servidor).
App Flow Logic: On Splash mount, read connections. If connections array is empty -> Auto-navigate to Connections screen. If connections exist -> Navigate to Login.
Login Screen: The 'Empresa' field is NOT a free-text input. It must display the selected connection from the saved list. When tapped, open a BottomSheet or Picker to select one.
Login Screen: Place the 'Conexões' icon button (e.g. Phosphor 'sliders' or 'hard-drives') prominently (either header right or inline near Empresa field) so users can manage servers.
Connections Screen: Support full CRUD. List saved servers. Provide a way to Add new (Empresa name, Servidor URL) and Delete existing.
Ensure max font weight is 500 across all text. Let font size dictate hierarchy.
Wrap screens with scrollable content in a container with a sticky button pinned at the bottom safe-area, utilizing glassmorphism where applicable.
All form fields should have labels placed above the inputs. Do not use floating labels.
